metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1073
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Immunohistochemical analysis of GlyT1 expression in neurons.
Figure 6 A-F: Pre-embedding immunogold staining of GLYT1 in the hippocampus the neocortex, and the spinal cord.
Figure 6 G-I, K: Post-embedding immunogold of GLYT1 in the dentate gyrus and the molecular layer of the cerebellum.
The profiles show localization in both the pre- and postsynaptic compartments, as well as in glial processes.
Figure 6G shows post-embedding immunogold staining for GLYT1 at the post synaptic density.
Figure 6J shows double post-embedding immunogold labeling for GLYT1 and NMDAR in the hippocampus, and demonstrates colocalization at the postsynaptic density.

2/7/2017 Pim
- Annotation was not made agains the membrane part of the PSD because staining does not suggest membrane localization.. Experimental description: "Localization of the GLYT1 glycine transporter at glutamatergic synapses in the rat brain"
